name: Eagle Ridge Church of God
description: Come play pickleball at Eagle Ridge Church of God in Midland, MI! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Greater Midland Community Center
description: Greater Midland Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Midland, MI. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Midland Central Park Courts
description: There is 1 tennis court along side the 6 pickleball courts that can be taped off and portable nets can be used to make 2 additional courts. It is located next to Midland Community Center and next to Miracle Baseball Field.
